posts.hook: The US just hit China's AI ambitions on two fronts in one day
posts.caption: trump officials weigh faster us open model releases while nvidia slashes chip buyers in singapore, malaysia and japan by half, apple ships its siri ai betas, and codex passes 7m users. full digest at sift.yasint.dev (link in bio)

slides.title: Nvidia cuts authorized AI chip buyers by over 50% in three countries
slides.desc: Singapore, Malaysia and Japan tightened to close export-control gaps to China

slides.title: Trump admin weighs faster releases for US open models
slides.desc: A direct answer to fears an open-weight ban could hand China the lead

slides.title: Apple's Siri AI public betas are already reshaping daily use
slides.desc: iOS, iPadOS, macOS, watchOS and tvOS 27 all shipped their first betas at once

slides.title: Codex usage is up over 10x in six months to 7 million users
slides.desc: Codex may now be closing in on Claude Code's last disclosed user numbers

slides.title: A doctor-authority prompt breaks MedGemma's safety guardrails
slides.desc: Simple reframing pushed one guardrail's bypass rate past 50%
